channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: A giant schnauzer named Monty has won the top prize at the Westminster Kennel Club
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — This time, the giant schnauzer went the full Monty. After coming close in the last two years, Monty the giant schnauzer won the top prize at the Westminster Kennel Club dog show Tuesday night, leaving handler and co-owner Katie Bernardin almost too emotional to speak.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pope rebukes Trump administration over immigrant deportations and appears to aim directly at Vance
item.description: ROME (AP) — Pope Francis issued a major rebuke Tuesday to the Trump administration’s plans for mass deportations of migrants, warning that the forceful removal of people purely because of their illegal status deprives them of their inherent dignity and “will end badly.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Court sets March 19 date for first execution in Arizona in over 2 years
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — The Arizona Supreme Court set a March 19 execution date Tuesday for a man who pleaded guilty to murder more than 17 years ago and recently said his death sentence was “long overdue.” It would be the state’s first application of the death penalty in more than two years.
item.dc:creator: JACQUES BILLEAUD, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Daily average of known gotaways at southern border plummets, down 93% from Biden administration highs
item.description: The average daily number of known gotaways at the southern border has dropped 93% since President Donald Trump returned to the Oval Office.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-49er Dana Stubblefield freed from prison after rape conviction overturned
item.description: A judge has granted the release of former San Francisco 49er Dana Stubblefield after his 2020 rape conviction was vacated by a California appeals court last December.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Most US kids aren't gaining fast enough in reading and math. These schools are different
item.description: COMPTON, Calif. (AP) — Math is the subject sixth grader Harmoni Knight finds hardest, but that's changing. In-class tutors and “data chats” at her middle school in Compton, California, have made a dramatic difference, the 11-year-old said.
item.dc:creator: ANNIE MA and JOCELYN GECKER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Punk rock pioneer battling stage 4 cancer and brain tumor; family asks for help
item.description: His family is holding a fundraiser to help pay for a nurse, physical therapy, and "day-to-day vital living expenses.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pope criticizes Trump administration's immigration policies
item.description: Pope Francis criticized President Donald Trump’s mass deportation plans in a letter urging compassion and the preservation of dignity for migrants in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Florida 'brothel' allegedly run by illegal immigrants shut down after victim's desperate phone call
item.description: Florida police have arrested two Guatemalan illegal immigrants for allegedly trafficking two women being held against their will at a residence in Lake Worth Beach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump signs executive order restoring plastic straw use in government
item.description: President Donald Trump signed an executive order directing the federal government to return to using plastic straws.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Canned tuna sold at Walmart, Trader Joe's, Costco, others recalled in multiple states
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has announced a recall on canned tuna products sold at several different retailers including Walmart, Trader Joe's, Kroger, and Costco.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Jet owned by Mötley Crüe singer in fatal collision at Arizona airport
item.description: One person was killed and others were injured when a private jet owned by Mötley Crüe singer Vince Neil collided with another jet Monday afternoon at the Scottsdale Airport in Arizona.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Blue city police sergeants say they're paid less than subordinates as billions go to migrants
item.description: NYPD sergeants are seeking a new contract with New York City as many make less than the rank-and-file officers they supervise, union president says.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trader Joe's, Smith's limit daily egg purchases due to nationwide shortages
item.description: Trader Joe's is limiting egg sales to one dozen per customer daily -- and it is not the only company doing so.
item.dc:creator: Aubree B. Jennings, ABC 4

item.title: Private jets collide at Scottsdale Airport in Arizona, killing at least 1 person, authorities say
item.description: At least one person was killed and others were injured when private jets collided Monday afternoon at the Scottsdale Airport in Arizona, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump signs off on new steel and aluminum tariffs
item.description: President Trump on Monday signed proclamations to bolster tariffs on all steel and aluminum imports into the United States and crack down on attempts by China and Russia to evade penalties. Trump in 2018 announced 25 percent tariffs on steel and 10 percent tariffs on aluminum imports.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WGN 9

item.title: Los Angeles family featured in Super Bowl commercial
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) – Taco Bell marked its return to the Super Bowl with a commercial that featured nearly 400 fans, including a couple from Los Angeles and their newborn baby.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5

item.title: Catalytic converters stolen from Illinois district's school buses, forcing students to stay home
item.description: A suburban Illinois school district was forced to hold an emergency e-learning day after the catalytic converters were stolen from "over 80%" of its buses.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, Fox 5

item.title: Researchers announce major discovery about Earth's inner core
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) – Researchers at the University of Southern California say they’ve unraveled the mystery of why Earth's inner core has been slowing, gradually altering the length of a day.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Third judge blocks Trump’s order ending birthright citizenship for kids of people in US illegally
item.description: CONCORD, N.H. (AP) — A third federal judge on Monday blocked President Donald Trump’s executive order ending birthright citizenship for the children of people who are in the U.S. illegally. The ruling from U.S. District Judge Joseph N.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST and KATHY McCORMACK, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: A 7.6 magnitude earthquake shakes the Caribbean, some islands urge residents to leave coastlines
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — A magnitude-7.6 earthquake shook the Caribbean Sea south of the Cayman Islands Saturday, according to the U.S. Geological Survey. Several islands and countries urged people near the coastline to move inland but authorities in most places later lifted the tsunami alerts.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jon Batiste's reimagined Super Bowl anthem highlighted wife's painting and set stage for new music
item.description: Jon Batiste transformed the Super Bowl stage into a symphony of creativity, debuting new music, reimagining “The Star-Spangled Banner" and shining a global spotlight on his wife's creative vision.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What happens to the Super Bowl losers' merch? It's being sent to these 5 countries
item.description: The NFL plans for both outcomes so they're ready regardless of who wins. What that inevitably means is a whole lot of merchandise that's pre-printed and pre-made – but fans won't ever be able to buy it.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Did you know? The flag presented during the national anthem at Super Bowl LIX came from Utah
item.description: The flag presented during the performance of the national anthem at Super Bowl LIX was handmade by a Utah-based flag company.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Here's what we know about a commuter plane crash in Alaska that killed 10 people
item.description: JUNEAU, Alaska (AP) — Authorities are focusing on the wreckage of a plane that crashed off western Alaska as they try to determine what caused the small commuter aircraft to go down in the icy Bering Sea, killing 10 people.
item.dc:creator: BECKY BOHRER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump says 25 percent tariffs on steel and aluminum coming Monday
item.description: Trump said that the steel and aluminum tariffs would impact “everybody” when asked what countries would be affected.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Eagles beat Chiefs 40-22 in lopsided Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs wanted to make history with three back-to-back-to-back championships, but Super Bowl LIX was dominated by the Philadelphia Eagles, who won the game 40-22.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: The Latest: Eagles spoil Chiefs' three-peat bid, win Super Bowl 40-22
item.description: Super Bowl 59 kicks off in just a few hours, when the Kansas City Chiefs will face a familiar foe, the Philadelphia Eagles, hoping to win the Lombardi Trophy for a record third year in a row.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump says he is serious about Canada becoming 51st state in Super Bowl interview
item.description: President Donald Trump said he is serious about wanting Canada to become the 51st state in an interview that aired Sunday during the Super Bowl preshow.
item.dc:creator: Jill Colvin, WFLA, NBC

item.title: WATCH: Snow blankets parts of Northeast US, up to a foot expected for some
item.description: A strong storm is expected to bring moderate to heavy snowfall across parts of the Upper Great Lakes on Saturday before intensifying overnight across the Northeast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: US Marine from California identified as one of 4 people killed in Philippines plane crash
item.description: CAMP PENDLETON, Calif. (AP) — A U.S. Marine from California was identified by military officials Sunday as one of four people killed when a plane contracted by the U.S. military crashed in a rice field in the southern Philippines. Sgt. Jacob M.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump official orders consumer protection agency to stop work
item.description: The Trump administration has ordered the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to stop nearly all its work, effectively shutting down an agency that was created to protect consumers after the 2008 financial crisis and subprime mortgage-lending scandal.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Remains of all 10 people killed in Alaska plane crash have been recovered: authorities
item.description: The remains of all 10 people killed when their small plane crashed into ice on the Bering Sea have been recovered, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Efforts to put carbon dioxide underground face less support in Trump's second term
item.description: CHEYENNE, Wyo. (AP) — Putting carbon dioxide from power plants and industrial facilities underground where it won’t contribute to global warming could see less federal support and enthusiasm under President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: MEAD GRUVER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Elon Musk perched behind Trump's desk in new TIME Magazine cover
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk is seen perched behind President Donald Trump's desk in the Oval Office in their latest cover.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, Fox 5
